channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Bikes parked on pavement do not let pass, 13th April
item.description:
Bikes parked on pavement do not let pass

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bayswater Road, Bayswater, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter, 13th April
item.description:
Regular street cleaning doesn’t seem to be happening. It is really needed in this spot as it’s so close to the High Road. Litter is building up

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2-8, Gracefield Gardens, Streatham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Significant pothole developing on exit from roundabout into Footscray lane, 13th April
item.description:
Significant pothole developing on exit from roundabout into Footscray lane
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1A, Foots Cray Lane, Albany Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox, 13th April
item.description:
Just to right hand side of the path as you enter craydene open space using the burns close entrance
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Burns Close, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish not collected, 13th April
item.description:
Rubbish has not been collected and the garbage bins are overflowing making the pavement dirty

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wellington Avenue, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tip on street, 13th April
item.description:
Mess all over street

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Southwold Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Persistent flytipping, 13th April
item.description:
There is a large amount of rubbish constantly flytipped next to the bins at the entrance to the NCP car park on Passey Place. This a persistent issue that needs to be addressed.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Passey Place, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish, 13th April
item.description:
This has been here over a month and i thought possibly belonged to Norris skips but it hasnt been moved and is preventing people from being able to park. The rubbish is increasing

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Station Approach, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Left rubbish, 13th April
item.description:
This has been here for a week and is preventing people from being able to park

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Station Approach, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumping, 13th April
item.description:
This keeps happening

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12, Sweeps Lane, St Mary Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping again, 13th April
item.description:
Fridge and chair and carpet blocking public path

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stoke Newington Common, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Shopping trolley on road, 13th April
item.description:
Someone left a shopping trolley on pavement now on road between 18-20 Montague road. Been there since Saturday night

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Montague Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping...still there!, 13th April
item.description:
Enfield Council stop closing reports and leaving rubbish there! It is still there and you closed this yesterday. There is more rubbish being added to it!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Gilbert Street, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox, 13th April
item.description:
Dead fox on verge, covered with a cloth

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 131, Green Lane, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly Tipping House Hold Rubbish AFTER bin day, 13th April
item.description:
Yet another repeat offender has chosen to dump their household rubbish shortly after the bin collection team has been through and worked hard to empty our bins and keep our streets clean. It’s becoming increasingly frustrating to walk down the road, having to dodge litter scattered along the way.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wickham Lane, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Shere House car park, SE1 - Flytipping, 13th April
item.description:
General Flytipping around recycling bins

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Globe Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: General fly tipping, 13th April
item.description:
We cleared this area as part of our litter pick. Someone has dumped here again!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Albion Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Faded Stoplines, 13th April
item.description:
E -Phase and F-Phase stop lines have faded.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Southbury Road, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 118A Durrington Road,, 13th April
item.description:
This frigde has been were for one month. This is a health and safety because we can't remove our black waste bin because the fridge is blocking the way. We're afraid that might fall on us.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Durrington Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Can this vehicle be removed please as it is blocking a dropped kerb, 13th April
item.description:
Please can this vehicle be inspected and removed if possible please?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wanstead Close, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
